docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAZQUEZ, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFICA NATURAL FOODS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PACIFICA FARMER'S MARKET JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
